RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling package

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle module

class RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle.CarbonCycling(soil_data: SoilData | None = None)

Bases: object

cycle_carbon(rainfall: float, temp_average: float, field_size: float) → None

Main routine for carbon cycle.

Parameters

rainfallfloat

Amount of rainfall on the current day (mm)

temp_averagefloat

Average temperature on the current day (mm)

field_sizefloat

Size of the field (ha)
